DEFENDANTS KUKA ASAIA MATTHEW AND ALYSSA SIMOEMOE ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ROSARIO DEL PILAR ESPINOSA NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALARCON, SONIA MARISOL SOSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTHEW, KUKA ASAIA TUAOLO, ALYSSA SIMOEMOE $8,389.46 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,389.46 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
